subject: Kikaonde
coverageNote: Form directories exist only where teaching-module source PDFs were ingested. Missing forms must resolve as known-gap, not empty objects.

lesson.title: Lumbulula bishina mu jishimikila ja mukanwa panyuma jiji jonse.
topics: Kamina: Uno mwingilo ubena kutala pa kulumbulula malwañano,kulondolola bishila mu
malwañano ne kusabaula malwañano mu jishimikila ja panyiwa.
